prompt: Ultra-realistic lifestyle portrait of a beautiful young East Asian woman sitting indoors during golden hour, captured in a cozy modern apartment beside large sunlit windows. She has long, silky black hair cascading over her shoulders, one hand gently running through her hair while resting her arm on a raised knee. She looks directly into the camera with a soft, playful smile and subtle dimples, creating an intimate, warm, and inviting mood. She wears a cream-white satin spaghetti-strap slip dress with elegant draping, revealing natural collarbones and shoulders. Her skin is smooth, luminous, and softly illuminated by warm golden sunlight streaming through the window, creating cinematic highlights and gentle shadows across her face and body. The background features a minimal, stylish interior with blurred flowers in glass vases, warm beige walls, soft decor, and a bright city view outside the window. Everything behind her is softly out of focus with a creamy bokeh effect, emphasizing depth and realism. Shot on an 85mm lens at f/1.8, eye-level composition, close-up portrait with natural perspective, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, detailed hair strands, warm color grading, soft ambient light, HDR, ultra-detailed, DSLR-quality, photorealistic, editorial lifestyle photography, 8K resolution, intimate candid atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
